Description:
Join us for a look at in progress work on Blazor integration with Aspire, where we’re exploring a new Blazor gateway and deeper platform integration to enable configuration flow, service discovery, richer diagnostics, and improved scaling for Blazor WebAssembly and Blazor Server apps.

🔗 Links: https://www.theurlist.com/blazor-standup-20260407

🎙️ Featuring: Daniel Roth, Javier Calvarro Nelson

#dotnet #aspnetcore #blazor #aspire
Title: Blazor Community Standup | Blazor integration with Aspire
Author: dotnet
